case2-a::case2-b.rationale: Same email, near-identical name — almost certainly a typo.

case3-a::case3-b.rationale: Same phone; 'Bob' is a common nickname for 'Robert' — same person.

case4-a::case4-b.rationale: Shared email and address but different first names — likely spouses.

case6-a::case6-b.rationale: Same plate and address; name looks like an abbreviation match.

case7-a::case7-b.rationale: Same name; email is a plus-addressed alias of the other.

case8-a::case8-b.rationale: Same email carried across a name change — likely the same person.

case8-b::case8-c.rationale: Same phone and name; different email suggests an account update.
